Localization.Description: Suspicious logon to DBMS PostgreSQL. Authentication data differ from the collected profile.

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.application.account.name} from host {src.host} logged in to DB {object.path} in application {event_src.title} on host {event_src.host}. The user is missing from the collected profile.
New user {subject.application.account.name} from host {src.host} logged in to application {event_src.title} on host {event_src.host}. The user is missing from the collected profile.
User {subject.application.account.name} from new host {src.host} logged in to application {event_src.title} on host {event_src.host}. The address is missing from the collected profile.

User {subject.application.account.name} from host {src.host} logged in to application {event_src.title} in a new way {logon_service} on host {event_src.host}. The address is missing from the collected profile.
